overview: SketchLair is a professional digital painting web application on ICP with a figure drawing Learn module, multi-document workflows, cloud preferences sync, and a new Stripe-powered marketplace for purchasing reference image packs.
features: Stripe-powered marketplace for purchasing reference image packs
Payments canister with webhook signature verification and idempotency
Per-pack USD pricing set by admins
On-chain entitlements tied to Internet Identity principal
Pack grid with owned/unowned state and checkout flow
Admin pricing UI and Stripe credentials configuration
Professional digital painting with WebGL brush engine
Figure drawing learn module with timer and pose references
Cloud preferences sync via ICP canister
